name: Manager is absent from the critical moment
description: A live pressure point arrives and the person expected to stabilize it is not visibly present, directing, or deciding.
source_ref: universal-signal-gold-set-01: manager absent from critical moment expressed through restaurant peak pressure leadership
evidence_types: rush or escalation happens without visible manager intervention
the floor looks leaderless during a pressure moment
decisions wait because the manager is not present
adapter_aliases: critical rush with no manager presence
